title: Railworld connected
description: A minecraft modpack based on the create trains and world building
body:
# Railworld Connected modpack
A minecraft modpack based on the create mod trains.

This pack is for people who are interested in building create train networks for transportation of people and goods.

This pack contains the following important mods:
- Create mod 6
- Railway navigator (for train screens)
- Applied energistics 2 (for advanced storage)
- Sophisticated Storage and Backpacks
